title: Senior Civil & Structural Engineer
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Brown Consulting Pte. Ltd. is an independent civil & structural engineering consultant. For over 25 years, we have been providing professional engineering consulting services and solutions to meet the most stringent requirements from many large scale infrastructure and architectural projects.

Job Summary

Coordinate and lead civil and structural engineering design projects by preparing documentation, managing client and authority relationships, and guiding engineering teams to deliver high-quality, compliant solutions within budget and schedule.

Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and prepare comprehensive design documentation for civil and structural engineering projects to meet technical and regulatory requirements
  • Develop and maintain collaborative relationships with internal teams and external clients to facilitate project success
  • Liaise effectively with local authorities to ensure design compliance and secure necessary approvals
  • Lead, develop, train, and support engineering staff, fostering a high-performance team environment
  • Budget and manage time and costs to deliver technical inputs aligned with project briefs and objectives
  • Adhere to established procedures and instructions during design tasks, ensuring alignment with project leadership directives
  • Implement and comply with project quality system requirements as defined in the Project Quality Plan
  • Identify and report any non-conformances with quality standards promptly to the Project Lead and recommend preventative actions
  • Resolve conflicts and achieve project goals in environments with competing priorities
  • Introduce and apply performance measurement tools to drive continuous improvement and enhance service delivery

Required competencies and certifications

  • Solid experience in preparing design and documentation for civil and structural engineering projects
  • Appropriate qualification such as Bachelor or Master Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering
  • Sound experience and proficiency in design software and adherence to relevant design standards
  • Relevant technical experience and familiarity with local engineering practices
